title: TEMI 4 Pack Emergency Vehicle Age 3+ with Lights and Sounds Toys Playsets for Kids, Rescue Helicopter, Police Car, Fire Truck, Ambulance Car Toys Kids Gift -12 Boys Girls
features: CITY HEROES VEHICLE SET - The Emergency rescue vehicle toy set contains 1 rescue helicopter, 1 police car, 1 fire truck and 1 ambulance. All of them have light and sound. Endless fun to children! Specification: Fire truck: 7.7* 2.7*3.5in. Ambulance: 7.7*2.9*3.1in. Police car: 7.7*3.5*1.9in. Helicopter: 7.7*2.9*3.7in.

EDUCATION VALUE - City rescue vehicle toy set has early educational value. Children can know the types of four vehicles. By pressing the button, your child will see the lights, the sound of the vehicle starts, the sound of the siren and the helicopter takes off. It is very suitable for parent -child education and cultivates children's cognitive ability, imagination and creativity.

REAL DETAILS - The door of the police car can be opened, the fire truck can spray water and the ladder of the fire truck can be retracted, the window of the helicopter can be opened, and the propeller can rotate. Children can use their imagination to simulate the situation.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS - The rescue trucks set made from high quality ABS, strong and durable. Made of non -toxic materials, don't worry about hurting children's health. Friction powered. When pushing gently, the vehicle can go on a smooth surface for a long distance.
PERFECT GIFT - It's a perfect gift for kids who love car toys. Ideal for boys and girls 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 years old in birthdays, parties, Children's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, New Year.
description: Product Description The urban rescue vehicle toy set has early educational value. FIRE ENGINE POLICE CAR HELICOPTER Retractable Needle The ladder of the fire truck can be retracted Can Open the Door The door of the police car can be opened. Can Open the Window The windows of the rescue helicopter can be opened Can be Filled with Water Inserting a water pipe can simulate water spraying Police Car Color Police cars are mainly rendered in black and white for their bodies Rotatable Propeller The propeller of a helicopter can rotate Perfect gift for kids！
